testcase.name: Dog API - Playwright API tests › GET /breeds/list/all returns object of breeds
Dog API - Playwright API tests › GET /breed/{breed}/images returns array of images
Dog API - Playwright API tests › GET /breed/{breed}/images/random returns single url
Dog API - Playwright API tests › GET random 3 images returns array of length 3
Dog API - Playwright API tests › GET invalid breed returns error
